message.content: Okay, imagine you're playing with paint and your hands get all messy. You need something to wipe the paint off, right? That's kind of like why humans use toilet paper. When animals like dogs or cats go to the bathroom, their bodies are really good at staying clean on their own. But humans need a little help to make sure they're all clean afterwards. Toilet paper helps wipe away anything that's dirty, just like you would wipe the paint off your hands, so you feel fresh and clean!
